title: T-004 — shift_patterns + org_non_production_days DDL + RLS (OEE-ADM-003 backing tables)
prompt:
# T-004 — shift_patterns + org_non_production_days backing tables

PRD: docs/prd/15-OEE-PRD.md §15.3 OEE-ADM-003 (Shift Patterns + Non-Production Calendar), §9.4 shift_configs companion, amendment OEE-PRD-AMEND-01
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create the OEE-owned operational tables backing OEE-ADM-003 (amendment OEE-PRD-AMEND-01 default: 15-OEE owns writes; 02-SETTINGS exposes read-only viewer): `shift_patterns` (per-line override of `shift_configs` for operational rota) and `org_non_production_days` (factory-wide closures consumed by shift_aggregator_v1).

## Pre-flight schema check
Read `packages/db/migrations/` for: latest migration number; presence of `app.current_org_id()`; existing `shift_configs` (T-003 must land first or be in same wave). Read PRD §15.3 OEE-ADM-003 layout (left pane shift patterns table; right pane non-production calendar).

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/NNNN_oee_a_shift_patterns_non_production_days.sql`:
   - `shift_patterns(id UUID PK, org_id NOT NULL, site_id UUID NULL, line_id TEXT NULL, shift_id TEXT NOT NULL REFERENCES shift_configs(shift_id) via composite (org_id, shift_id), start_time TIME, end_time TIME, days_active TEXT[], is_active BOOL, R13 audit, UNIQUE(org_id, line_id, shift_id))`. NULL line_id means org-wide pattern.
   - `org_non_production_days(id UUID PK, org_id NOT NULL, site_id UUID NULL, date DATE NOT NULL, reason TEXT CHECK (reason IN ('holiday','maintenance','plant_closure','custom')), notes TEXT, R13 audit, UNIQUE(org_id, site_id, date))`.
2. ENABLE+FORCE RLS; policies via `app.current_org_id()` + `site_user_access` exactly like T-003.
3. Index `idx_org_npd_date ON org_non_production_days(org_id, date)`; index `idx_shift_patterns_org_line ON shift_patterns(org_id, line_id, is_active)`.
4. Drizzle schemas in `packages/db/src/schema/oee/shift-patterns.ts` and `packages/db/src/schema/oee/non-production-days.ts`.
5. Vitest: (a) RLS isolation across two orgs, (b) reason CHECK enforced, (c) FK to shift_configs via composite key, (d) policy text references `app.current_org_id()`.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/NNNN_oee_a_shift_patterns_non_production_days.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/oee/shift-patterns.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/oee/non-production-days.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/oee-a-shift-patterns-npd.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the migration runs, when `\d shift_patterns` and `\d org_non_production_days` are read, then PRD §15.3-derived columns + R13 audit + RLS+FORCE RLS + listed indexes exist.
2. Given two orgs and `app.set_org_context`, when SELECT runs in each session, then RLS isolation holds and policy text references `app.current_org_id()` with no `current_setting()` reads.
3. Given an `org_non_production_days` row with reason='invalid_value', when inserted, then the CHECK constraint rejects it.
4. Given a `shift_patterns` row referencing a non-existent shift_id for the org, when inserted, then it fails with FK violation.

## Test strategy
- RED: vitest oee-a-shift-patterns-npd asserting four ACs.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test oee-a-shift-patterns-npd`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not name business column tenant_id; use org_id.
- Do not read current_setting() GUC; use app.current_org_id().
- Do not skip composite FK (org_id, shift_id) on shift_patterns — single-column shift_id is not unique across orgs.
- Do not implement 24h-coverage / overlap validators here — those are Server Action invariants (T-022).
- Do not couple to UI (T-022).

pipeline_inputs.description: Backing tables for OEE-ADM-003 (shift_patterns + org_non_production_days) per amendment OEE-PRD-AMEND-01 default (15-OEE owns writes). RLS via app.current_org_id().
pipeline_inputs.details: amendment OEE-PRD-AMEND-01 default decision: 15-OEE OEE-ADM-003 is the canonical write-owner of org_non_production_days; 02-SETTINGS §8.1 viewer is read-only. shift_patterns extends shift_configs with per-line operational rotation. Both tables feed shift_aggregator_v1 (T-008) and are consumed by OEE-ADM-003 UI (T-022). Reason taxonomy from PRD §15.3 layout (Holiday/Maintenance/Plant Closure/Custom).
